NOTE: Aggiungi questi item al file items.json esistente

swords.name: Novice Sword
swords.description: A basic training sword for novice warriors.

swords.name: Apprentice Sword
swords.description: A refined blade for apprentice swordsmen.

swords.name: Disciple Sword
swords.description: A masterwork blade worthy of true disciples.

gems.name: ForceGem
gems.description: Adds 1 Prefix to a weapon (max 2). If already at max, the gem is returned.

gems.name: Gem of Agility
gems.description: Adds 1 Suffix to a weapon (max 2). If already at max, the gem is returned.

gems.name: Gem of Chaos
gems.description: Rerolls all bonus tiers (T1-T7) and values. Keeps bonus count and categories.

gems.name: Gem of Excellence
gems.description: Adds the 5th bonus (Special) if not present. If already present, gem is returned.

gems.name: Gem of Renewal
gems.description: Replaces 1 random bonus with another of the same category. Tier is maintained.
